mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password, nickname, preferred_lang, created_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{preferredLang}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, nickname, preferred_lang AS preferredLang, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT count(*) FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
SELECT id, email, nickname, preferred_lang AS preferredLang, created_at AS createdAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
